review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating tasks/v0.7-m1-protocol-reframing.md and tasks/v0.7-m1-scenario-modeling.md.
Verify the content of the two markdown files adequately defines the core protocol, roles (Executor, Reviewer, Gatekeeper, Coordinator), and Personal/Team Mode scenarios.
Verify NO implementation code in src/, NO workflow state mutations, and NO modifications to existing docs or protocol files occurred.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
